economic_notes: Nation has investments in 0987339 BC Ltd. (which consolidates Stellat'en Holdings LP, Stellat'en Holdings Inc., Atsiyan Services LP and Atsiyan Services Inc.) and Stellako Custom Wood Ltd., accounted for by modified equity method. Also holds minority interests in Lhai Ventures LP (25%), Endako Tsey LP (25%), and Endako Tsey GP Corporation (25%) at cost. During the year, Stellat'en Holdings LP acquired 99.99% of Atsiyan Services LP.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: 0987339 BC Ltd. and Stellako Custom Wood Ltd. 0987339 BC Ltd. earned $2,888,819 during the year. Nation has three entities accounted for at cost (minority interests). Restricted cash of $172,617 relates to unexpended gaming funds. Portfolio investments of $2,526,189 held at CIBC Wood Gundy and Walton Investment Group. Accumulated surplus of $30,124,185 includes $6,006,897 investment in Nation business entities and $244,859 accumulated remeasurement gains. CMHC revenue was nil in current year (prior year $401,911). No remuneration schedule included in extracted text. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $4,091,882 + FNHA $280,289 + CMHC $0 + Province of BC $101,964 + Carrier Sekani Tribal Council $2,069,283 + Prince George Aboriginal Employment and Training $991 + Ottawa Trust Fund $1,680 = $6,546,089; osr = $11,764,728 - $6,546,089 = $5,218,639. Note: Carrier Sekani Family Services ($353,142) may also be a government-linked transfer.
